Title: Relates to the appointment of commissioners for the Seaview/Ocean Bay Park garbage district
Summary: Provides that the Seaview/Ocean Bay Park garbage district shall have 7 commissioners; provides for the requirements for appointment of such commissioners.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 787 of the laws of 1934 relating to the collection and disposal of garbage and other refuse substances, in relation to the appointment of commissioners for the Seaview/Ocean Bay Park garbage district
